title: Lets Complete the Emails and Activities App to Google Calendar Synch
excerpt: The E&A app allows you to connect to Google Calendar. items/events can be created in the E&A App or Google Calendar and reflected in a separate activities board. The Functionality however is extremely limited and these l…

posts.author: James.Deguara (James Deguara)
posts.cookedHtml:
The E&A app allows you to connect to Google Calendar. items/events can be created in the E&A App or Google Calendar and reflected in a separate activities board. The Functionality however is extremely limited and these limitations prevent it from delivering on our clients expectations.

CREATE
From E&A App to Google Calendar - Works fine

From Google Calendar to E&A App - Manual / automation workaround required to assign contact to calendar event - not great but acceptable.

AMEND
From E&A App to Google Calendar - Amendments made in E&A app not reflected in the activities board or Google Calendar - this is clearly needs to be fixed.

From Google Calendar to E&A App - Although amendments are reflected in the Activities board, these updates do not make their way into the E&A App

CANCELLATIONS
From E&A App to Google Calendar - Not possible to cancel a meeting in the E&A App. You can delete an item in the E&A App, but this has no effect on the Activities board or Google calendar.

From Google Calendar to E&A App - Cancellation made in Google Calendar is replicated in the Activities board but NOT in the E&A App

The deficiencies mentioned above prevent us from promoting the App, as these basic functions are not supported. If there are any amendments / cancellations / re-booking then the E&A app / activities board / google calendar will go out of synch and cause confusion to the team using it.

Requested changes:
MUST - Synch updates made in the Activities board to the E&A App
MUST - Synch updates made in the E&A App to the Activities board
SHOULD - Synch cancellations / deletions in the E&A App
COULD - Link events created in Google Calendar to Contact/Lead in Monday
